text: I'm honestly not sure if I'm using the booking page correctly. I selected Dr. Bob and picked a time slot, then clicked confirm, and the page just kind of refreshed without any explanation. I eventually saw the appointment in my list but it wasn't clear that the booking actually succeeded.
The interface is pretty confusing. When I go to the appointments page I see a table with statuses like CONFIRMED and PENDING but it's not obvious what those mean or what I should do next.
I spent like ten minutes trying to figure out how to reschedule an appointment. The reschedule button opens a form but it wasn't clear that I needed to click save again afterwards.
Maybe I'm missing something obvious but the cancel button placement is weird. I kept looking for it near the appointment details but it was hidden inside the table actions.
The booking page works but it feels clunky. Every time I pick a doctor the rest of the form resets and I have to select the date again.
I'm a bit annoyed because I couldn't tell if my appointment was actually booked. There wasn't any obvious confirmation message after submitting the form.
Why does the system only show three doctors? I assumed there would be more options but the dropdown is very limited.
The help page asked me to describe my issue but after submitting it I had no idea whether the message actually went through.
I tried to cancel an appointment and it technically worked but the page didn't show any confirmation so I kept refreshing just to make sure.
Honestly the UI is pretty confusing. I'm never sure what step I'm currently in when booking.
Not sure if this is just me but the booking form looks very minimal and doesn't explain the process well.
The system works but it feels unfinished. There are a lot of small things that make it confusing to use.
The appointments page is a bit hard to read. I wish it had clearer labels or instructions.
I tried rescheduling an appointment and wasn't sure if the change was saved or not.
I accidentally booked the wrong doctor and it took me a while to figure out how to change it.
The payment page was confusing because it shows card details but doesn't explain whether payment happens immediately or later.
I'm a bit frustrated because I had to reload the appointments page multiple times just to see the updated status.
I couldn't immediately figure out how to go back from the booking page to the main menu.
The booking form doesn't explain what happens if you cancel an appointment later.
Honestly the site just feels confusing overall. I'm never quite sure where to click next.
I was trying to help my parents use this booking system and they were completely lost. The workflow is not very intuitive.
The layout of the appointments table is a bit cramped and hard to read.
The booking flow technically works but it's not obvious what steps come next.
I had to guess what the status labels meant because there was no explanation.
I clicked confirm appointment and waited because I wasn't sure if the system was processing or stuck.
Maybe it's just me but the system feels confusing for first time users.
The booking form is simple but almost too simple. I kept wondering if I missed a step.
The cancel appointment button worked but I wish there was a clearer confirmation message.
I couldn't tell whether the payment page was secure or not because there wasn't much explanation.
The interface feels inconsistent. Some buttons say confirm while others say save.
The site is usable but definitely not very user friendly.
I had to refresh the page a few times before I felt confident that my booking worked.
It's hard to tell what actions are available on the appointments page.
I accidentally opened the reschedule form and couldn't figure out how to close it again.
The booking page could really use some instructions for first time users.
The interface is a bit confusing and I wasn't sure which buttons were important.
The system technically works but the workflow is not very clear.
I spent a while trying to understand how rescheduling works.
The booking form resets some fields when I change a selection which is a bit annoying.
I had trouble figuring out how to navigate back to the home page.
The help page could probably explain things better because I wasn't sure what category to choose.
The interface feels a bit unfinished and confusing.
I kept second guessing whether my appointment was actually booked.
The workflow between booking and payment wasn't very clear to me.
Honestly the system just feels harder to use than it should be.
I wish the app gave clearer feedback when something is completed.
The navigation could definitely be simpler.
It took me a while to understand how the appointment table works.
The booking flow feels confusing and not very intuitive.
I'm sure the system works fine but it's not very easy to understand at first glance.
